name: pixabay-bgm-catalog
license: Tracks are from Pixabay; usage must comply with each track's license and site terms. This file only includes public track links and does not contain audio files.
howToUse: For training/video Skill use: Based on the user's described scene, mood, and theme, match keywords with tags and title in items (synonyms, fuzzy, or multi-word matches are allowed). Select 1-3 tracks as BGM recommendations and briefly explain the reason. Each item contains a downloadUrl (Pixabay CDN MP3 direct link), which can be downloaded directly using fetch/curl/yt-dlp. Tags are merged from the Genre and keywords on the official list page.
